allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'DONE'")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Expo version:', d.get\('version','?'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/expo/package.json'\); console.log\('Expo:', p.version\); const rn=require\('./node_modules/react-native/package.json'\); console.log\('RN:', rn.version\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./node_modules/react-native-reanimated'\); const apis=['FadeInDown','FadeInRight','withSpring','withTiming','useAnimatedStyle','useSharedValue','interpolateColor','Easing','withRepeat']; apis.forEach\(api => console.log\(api+':', typeof r[api]\)\)")

Bash(node -e "['expo','react-native','react-native-reanimated','react-native-svg','expo-linear-gradient'].forEach\(p => { try { console.log\(p+':', require\('./node_modules/'+p+'/package.json'\).version\) } catch\(e\) { console.log\(p+': NOT FOUND'\) } }\)")
